# Contributing to XIV ToDo

Thank you for your interest in contributing to XIV ToDo! This project provides dashboards, checklists, and tools for Final Fantasy XIV players. Contributions of all kinds—bug fixes, features, optimizations, and translations—are welcome and appreciated.

## How to contribute

### 1. Translations
If you want to help translate XIV ToDo into other languages, please do not open a pull request directly for translation files. Instead, use our Crowdin project:
- **Crowdin Project:** [XIV ToDo on Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/xiv-todo)

We currently support translations for French (fr), German (de), and Japanese (ja).

### 2. Reporting issues
If you encounter a bug or have a feature request:
1. Search existing issues to ensure it hasn't been reported yet.
2. Open a new issue with a clear title and description.
3. For bugs, please include:
   - Steps to reproduce the issue.
   - Expected vs. actual behavior.
   - Relevant screenshots or console/log output if applicable.
   - Any character or Lodestone info if it's data-specific.

### 3. Submitting pull requests
If you want to contribute code changes:
1. Fork the repository.
2. Create a new branch for your feature or bug fix:
   ```sh
   git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name
   # or
   git checkout -b fix/your-bugfix-name
   ```
3. Make your changes and ensure they follow our code standards.
4. Commit your changes with a clear and descriptive commit message.
5. Push to your fork and submit a pull request (PR) to the upstream `main` branch.

## Development guide

Please refer to the main [README.md](../README.md) for detailed prerequisites and setup instructions.
